_comment: Great People catalog. Layout (portraitCell [col,row], 4x3 grid of 362px cells) is the art<->code contract with assets/great_people/great_people.png. Each great person, when integrated into a city, applies its `bonus` (a city-scoped BuildingEffects block: flat yields + percentage bonuses + happiness/growth) to that one city for the rest of the game. They are globally unique -- only one of each may be born in a match (like a wonder).

greatPeople.name: Euclid
greatPeople.title: Father of Geometry
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +2 science and +20% science in this city
greatPeople.description: Euclid lays out his Elements on the table, and a city's scholars never reason the same way again. +2 science and a 20% boost to all science produced here.

greatPeople.name: Aristotle
greatPeople.title: The First Teacher
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +2 science, +1 culture, and +10% science in this city
greatPeople.description: Aristotle founds a Lyceum where every question is fair game. +2 science, +1 culture, and a 10% boost to science here.

greatPeople.name: Hypatia
greatPeople.title: Philosopher of Alexandria
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +3 science and +1 gold in this city
greatPeople.description: Hypatia charts the heavens and the ledgers alike. +3 science and +1 gold here.

greatPeople.name: Pythagoras
greatPeople.title: Master of Number and Harmony
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +1 science, +2 culture, and +10% science in this city
greatPeople.description: Pythagoras hears music in the motion of the spheres, and his school blurs the line between art and proof. +1 science, +2 culture, and a 10% boost to science here.

greatPeople.name: Homer
greatPeople.title: Poet of the Epics
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +3 culture and +1 happiness in this city
greatPeople.description: Homer gives a people their songs, and a people with songs hold fast. +3 culture and +1 happiness here.

greatPeople.name: Sappho
greatPeople.title: The Tenth Muse
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +2 culture, +1 gold, and +1 happiness in this city
greatPeople.description: Sappho turns longing into verse that travels every trade road. +2 culture, +1 gold, and +1 happiness here.

greatPeople.name: Herodotus
greatPeople.title: Father of History
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +2 culture, +1 science, and +1 gold in this city
greatPeople.description: Herodotus wanders the known world and writes it all down -- inquiry, gossip, and wonder together. +2 culture, +1 science, and +1 gold here.

greatPeople.name: Aesop
greatPeople.title: Teller of Fables
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +1 culture and +2 happiness in this city
greatPeople.description: Aesop hides hard truths inside the tales of beasts, and the people laugh, and learn, and keep the peace. +1 culture and +2 happiness here.

greatPeople.name: Archimedes
greatPeople.title: Master of Machines
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +3 production and +15% production in this city
greatPeople.description: Archimedes rigs levers, screws, and engines until the city's workshops do the work of ten. +3 production and a 15% boost to production here.

greatPeople.name: Zhang Heng
greatPeople.title: Polymath of Han
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +2 production and +2 science in this city
greatPeople.description: Zhang Heng builds the seismograph and the armillary sphere -- an engineer who is also a stargazer. +2 production and +2 science here.

greatPeople.name: Sun Tzu
greatPeople.title: Author of The Art of War
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +2 production and +2 happiness in this city
greatPeople.description: Sun Tzu drills the garrison into a disciplined arsenal, and an orderly city sleeps soundly behind it. +2 production and +2 happiness here.

greatPeople.name: Confucius
greatPeople.title: The Great Sage
greatPeople.bonusSummary: +2 culture, +1 science, +1 happiness, and faster growth in this city
greatPeople.description: Confucius teaches harmony between ruler and ruled, and a city in harmony prospers and swells. +2 culture, +1 science, +1 happiness, and +20% growth carryover here.
